description: Enforce strict documentation and typing standards for all Hono APIs.
conditions: Whenever a new API route is created using Hono.
actions: Require the use of @hono/zod-openapi instead of standard Hono instances.
Mandate that every createRoute definition includes a unique operationId.
Enforce that all route validations use schemas derived directly from the database layer via drizzle-orm/zod.
Ensure both /swagger and /scalar documentation endpoints are exposed and functional.
